brand.name: Nozomi Care
brand.tagline: The Essence of Care from Japan
brand.description: 40 years of experience in elderly care and self-reliance support from Nozomi Group - Japan.

hero.title: Care with Love and Self-reliance
hero.subtitle: Supporting the elderly to live happily, healthily, and maintain independence with Japanese standards in Vietnam.

services.title: Superior Capability from 40 Years of Experience
services.description: High-level techniques from Japan, transferred to Vietnamese staff, and supervised by Japanese experts.

rehab.title: Independence Support
rehab.description: Advanced techniques from Japan help the elderly maintain daily living activities.

specialist.title: Japanese Experts
specialist.description: Direct supervision by experienced experts from Nozomi Group Japan.

training.title: Transfer Training
training.description: Vietnamese staff are thoroughly trained according to strict Japanese standards.

philosophy.title: HOPE Philosophy
philosophy.description: Respecting INDEPENDENCE and bringing HOPE to the elderly.

points.1: Do not 'do for them', but listen and support so the elderly can do it themselves.
points.2: Every personalized plan originates from the elderly's own wishes and motivations.
points.3: Active recovery: Support for physical and mental rehabilitation.

solutions.title: COMPREHENSIVE COMPANIONSHIP ON EVERY JOURNEY
solutions.subtitle: We provide specialized solutions for each stage

rehab.title: SPECIALIZED REHABILITATION
rehab.description: For post-stroke and post-surgery recovery, featuring the Polaris Rehabilitation System (Japanese standard) and personal trainers.

dementia.title: DEMENTIA CARE
bullets: Emotional therapy activities to minimize behavioral symptoms.

palliative.title: END-OF-LIFE CARE
bullets: Care for anxiety reduction, focusing on comfort and peace.
Health management and monitoring by nursing staff.
Close medical connection with doctors and hospitals.

footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe to receive the latest updates from Nozomi Care.

pioneering.title: NOT JUST A CENTER, BUT A PIONEERING UNIT

1.title: 1. Japanese Standard Expertise
bullets: Directly supervised and trained by Japanese management and specialists.
Applying examination and care standards based on the 6-level scale of the Nozomi Method.

2.title: 2. Superior Facilities
bullets: Spaces and equipment designed for maximum safety, friendliness, and ease of use for the elderly.
Modern Polaris Rehabilitation equipment following Japanese standards with personalized coaching.

3.title: 3. Ensuring nutritional quality and recovery through dietary support
bullets: Applying recovery exercises through dietary habits.

4.title: 4. Person-Centered Care
bullets: Strong commitment to respecting individual wishes.

5.title: 5. Professional Training System
bullets: Building Japanese-standard training pathways in Vietnam, laying the foundation for high-quality human resources development in the industry.

1.title: 1. Becoming a Model Implementation
1.description: Not just a care facility, but a practical model for improving quality of life, increasing longevity, and motivation for the elderly in Vietnam.

2.title: 2. Japanese-Standard Human Resource Training
2.description: Building and operating a specialized training system to standardize and elevate the skills of the Vietnamese nursing team to international standards.

3.title: 3. Creating a Japan-Vietnam Cycle
3.description: Architecting a sustainable cycle in human resource training and development, from training caregivers to developing future leaders and managers for the Vietnamese nursing market.
